NeverRanked · The record

Every claim, on the record.

Each number below came from a question set locked by hash and a dated measurement, with the method documented in full. Each one is tied to the run that produced it. Nothing here is a vibe.

Predicted before measured

The strongest claim is one made before the data exists. This one was committed to a dated, timestamped record first, then measured.

Pre-registered · committed 2026-06-09, before any data existed

Claude would cite Honolulu AC companies' own websites less than 5% of the time. Measured at 2%. The commit timestamp predates the first measurement run. Committed to a dated, timestamped record before the measurement ran.

The published claims

39 numbers across 10 measurements. Each block names the date it was measured, the hash that locks the question set, and links to the full teardown it came from.

Hawaii consumer banking

Measured 2026-05-26 · question set 48b6c76f... · teardown
  • Perplexity own-share (top of 75-pt spread): 75%
  • Bing/Copilot own-share (bottom of spread): 0%
  • web own-site share: 53%

  • Gemma own-share (top of table): 68%
  • web own-site share: 47%

  • Gemma own-share: 20%
  • Claude own-share (the inversion): 18%
  • ChatGPT search own-share: 1%

  • web own-site share (most aggregator-dominated category): 14%

hotels_hawaii

Measured 2026-06-21 · question set 45ed5eee... · teardown
  • Claude own-share (top): 47%
  • Gemma own-share: 42%
  • ChatGPT search own-share: 30%
  • Gemini own-share: 12%
  • Bing/Copilot own-share: 0%
  • hotel-owned share / boutique-beats-chain: 47%

Why this page exists

Most marketing claims cannot be checked. These can. Every number above came from a question set locked by hash, on a named date, with the method documented in full at /methodology. A claim tied to a dated, hash-locked run is a different kind of claim than one that is not, and a vendor whose work is not actually measured cannot publish a page like this.

How we measure All teardowns
NeverRanked · Honolulu · Lance@hi.neverranked.com
